summary: Iteration 20 — Student Leaderboard TPS enhancements verified end-to-end. Backend: 11/11 pytest tests passed (1 skipped for end-to-end interview-complete which requires a logged-in pro token — TPS-refresh path is otherwise covered by code-path + profile-update test). Frontend: leaderboard renders with 100 participants, TPS hero strip + Resume / Interviews / Avg Rating stat columns, Applied & Referrals columns removed; filter popup contains Category/Skill/Location dropdowns (Skill & Location populated dynamically from /api/leaderboard/students/options; Skill is searchable); Min Score / Max Score / Min Rating / Min Jobs / Min Refs fields are gone; Apply Filters closes the popup + refreshes list (filter dot indicator appears); Clear resets and refreshes. TPS formula validated: resume_score=85, interviews=5, rating=8.4 → 84.47 (exact). Legacy query params (min_score, max_score, …) ignored without 500.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 4278 lines — over the 700-line recommended cap. Consider splitting into routers per resource (auth, profile, interviews, leaderboard, payouts, admin) for maintainability.

Frontend leaderboard.tsx: options endpoint can race with auth-restore on hard-refresh, causing an early 401 + empty Skill/Location dropdowns. Mitigated in practice because the user logs in first; consider retrying /options once auth becomes ready, or gating the effect on token presence.

Test report observed two transient 401s on direct goto('/student/leaderboard') right after page.evaluate-based token write. Real users coming via login flow are unaffected (verified via in-app navigation).
seed_data_creation: Created ephemeral TEST_lb_student_* and TEST_uitst_* student accounts via signup + verify-otp (mock_otp). No production data modified. These can be cleaned via db.users.delete_many({email: {$regex: '^TEST_'}}) if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_iter20_leaderboard.py exercises /api/leaderboard/students, /api/leaderboard/students/options, the TPS formula (compute_tps) directly via import, profile-update TPS refresh, and the backfill ratio. The interview-complete e2e is skipped because we cannot mint a professional JWT from this harness; if needed, log in as a known pro from the credentials file and call /interviews/{slot_id}/complete after seeding a 'in_progress' slot row in Mongo.
rca_of_issue: N/A — all in-scope behaviour matched the spec.
